title: Natrium
description: Optimization mod for Better Than Adventure
body:
_This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3!
For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page._

This mod greatly increases FPS by using OpenGL's MultiDraw to render all chunks at once.

Before ![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d95b582e4317e1e6e14c5fb2e2816fb3da38c4e.png)
After ![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ca8f293f703bf193b4d38179214a895129b8066.png)

Compatible with Babric and ASMLoader
